items.title: What founders can learn from Anjuna’s layoffs and recovery
items.creator: Maggie Nye, Isabelle Johannessen
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: What founders can learn from Anjuna’s layoffs and recovery
items.content: In 2021, Anjuna Security was growing fast, hiring aggressively, and chasing a market that seemed limitless. By the end of that year, the venture-backed cybersecurity company had scaled to around 75 employees, building out sales, customer success, and support teams in anticipation of continued hypergrowth. Then 2022 hit.

items.translated_title: StubHub to pay $10M to settle FTC allegations over ‘deceptive’ ticket pricing
items.content: The consumer protection agency says the company violated the FTC Act and its Rule on Unfair or Deceptive Fees by "deceptively" advertising ticket prices on its website without clearly disclosing upfront what the total cost would be, including all mandatory fees.

items.translated_title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
items.content: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?

items.title: Google and Intel deepen AI infrastructure partnership
items.creator: Rebecca Szkutak
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Google and Intel deepen AI infrastructure partnership

images.alt: A Google Cloud logo outside the Google Cloud data center ahead of its ceremonial opening in Hanau, Germany, on Friday, Oct. 6, 2023. Microsoft Corp., Alphabet Inc.'s Google and ChatGPT maker OpenAI use cloud computing that relies on thousands of chips inside servers in massive data centers across the globe to train AI algorithms called models, analyzing data to help them learn to perform tasks. Photographer: Alex Kraus/Bloomberg via Getty Images

items.content: The two tech giants are looking to co-develop custom chips, at a time when demand for CPUs is high due to a growing global shortage.

items.title: Sierra’s Bret Taylor says the era of clicking buttons is over
items.creator: Marina Temkin
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Sierra’s Bret Taylor says the era of clicking buttons is over
items.content: Last month, Sierra launched Ghostwriter, an agent designed to build other agents. With this “agent as a service” tool, the startup intends to replace traditional click-based web applications with natural language. Users simply describe what they need, prompting Ghostwriter to autonomously create and deploy a specialized agent to execute the task.

items.creator: TechCrunch Events
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Final 2 days to save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket

images.alt: General atmosphere at TechCrunch Disrupt Berlin 2017 at Arena Berlin.

items.content: Ticket discounts of up to $500 will end tomorrow, April 10, at 11:59 p.m. PT. After that, prices for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 go up again. Miss this, and you’ll be paying more for the same access to one of the most anticipated tech events of the year. Register now to lock in these savings.
